CO-EXIST CHAT UI POLISH — three specific fixes flagged 6 May 2026 ~10:36 AEST. Cold start, no conversation context. Brief is everything.

REPO: coexist (registered codebase). Locate via mcp__factory__list_codebases or `find ~/workspaces -maxdepth 3 -name 'coexist' -type d`. Likely path /home/tate/workspaces/coexist/fe or /home/tate/workspaces/coexist (the FE side; this is a Capacitor mobile app + likely a web client). The chat surface is on the member-side / app-side, not admin-side.

ORIGIN �

CHAMBERS NAV: PORT THE CO-EXIST PATTERN. Cold start, no conversation context. Brief is everything.

ORIGIN — Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 ~10:42 AEST:
"The chambers nav is the exact same? Still not the best design for fitting everything simply and intelligently. The Co-Exist bottom tab bar and side sheet are really good way to do it i feel"

WHAT WE'VE TRIED ALREADY (and Tate isn't satisfied):
- Commit 950bf42: added admin items to bottom tab bar + DesktopTopNav. Bottom bar got crowded.
- Commit 2
